reactions, adsorption and diffusion influences in heterogenious reactions.

An overview of heterogeneous catalysis in various energy-related applications, including petroleum refining, chemicals from biomass, valorization of shale gas, and CO2 utilization will be introduced. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in CHBE302, CHBE424, and CHBE440; and permission of instructor.

Jointly offered with: CHBE486.
